summary: Dashboard first-load performance optimization: removed vendor-pdf from modulepreload (172KB gzip), eliminated 2 Supabase queries, cached getCurrentUser
HAR on localhost inflates query counts 2-3x vs production (StrictMode doubles effects)
rule: Always measure performance on production, not localhost

summary: Barrel exports break lazy loading: @shared/services/index.js pulls entire dependency chain into main bundle
Vite manualChunks creates separate chunks but modulepreload links negate lazy loading benefits
PDF report generation: clinical consultation format with patient demographics, medications, adherence data
